Class MockSmartHomeService

java.lang.Object
at.jku.se.smarthome.service.mock.MockSmartHomeService
public final class MockSmartHomeService extends Object
Mock Smart Home Service providing simulated device management. This is a Singleton service that manages a collection of mock devices and provides methods to control them without connecting to a real backend. For now, all changes are in-memory only.

  • Method Details

    • getInstance

      public static MockSmartHomeService getInstance()
      Gets the singleton instance of MockSmartHomeService.
      Returns:
      the singleton instance

    • resetForTesting

      public static void resetForTesting()
      Resets the singleton for unit testing. Must NOT be called from production code.

    • getDevices

      public javafx.collections.ObservableList<Device> getDevices()
      Gets all devices as an observable list.
      Returns:
      observable list of devices

    • getDeviceById

      public Device getDeviceById(String deviceId)
      Gets a device by its ID.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - the device identifier
      Returns:
      the device, or null if not found

    • toggleDevice

      public boolean toggleDevice(String deviceId)
      Toggles the power state of a device.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - the device identifier
      Returns:
      true if the toggle was successful, false otherwise

    • setBrightness

      public boolean setBrightness(String deviceId, int brightness)
      Sets the brightness level of a dimmer device.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - the device identifier
      brightness - the brightness level (0-100)
      Returns:
      true if successful, false otherwise

    • setTemperature

      public boolean setTemperature(String deviceId, double temperature)
      Sets the temperature of a thermostat device.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - the device identifier
      temperature - the target temperature in Celsius
      Returns:
      true if successful, false otherwise

    • authenticate

      public boolean authenticate(String email, String password)
      Authenticates a user with email and password. Mock implementation accepts any non-empty credentials.
      Parameters:
      email - the user's email
      password - the user's password
      Returns:
      true if authentication is successful

    • getCurrentUser

      public String getCurrentUser()
      Gets the current logged-in user.
      Returns:
      the current user's display name

    • logout

      public void logout()
      Logs out the current user.

    • openBlind

      public boolean openBlind(String deviceId)
      Opens a blind/cover device (sets state to true = OPEN).
      Parameters:
      deviceId - the device identifier
      Returns:
      true if successful, false if the device is not found or not a Cover/Blind

    • closeBlind

      public boolean closeBlind(String deviceId)
      Closes a blind/cover device (sets state to false = CLOSED).
      Parameters:
      deviceId - the device identifier
      Returns:
      true if successful, false if the device is not found or not a Cover/Blind

    • injectSensorValue

      public boolean injectSensorValue(String deviceId, double value)
      Injects a test value into a sensor device. Any double is accepted — sensors have no inherent range constraint.
      Parameters:
      deviceId - the device identifier
      value - the value to inject
      Returns:
      true if successful, false if the device is not found or not a Sensor
